description: Mmesh uppers provide maximum ventilation Synthetic overlays and reinforced overlay at the heel counter for enhanced shoe structure Lace-ups for snug Fit Iconic three stripes symbolising elegance and durability in silver and navy on the sides Padded and meshed collar, soft fabric shoe lining and cushioned insole provide all day comfort Foamy rubber midsole for absolute comfort adiPrene+ midsole in the forefoot maintains propulsion and efficiency Heel stabiliser element improves running transitions Torsion system for midfoot integrity adiPrene under the heel for superior cushioning at impactOutsole offers the ultimate in high-wear durability Deep flex grooves Decoupled heel
